name: Larry Minutillo - Mortgage Lender; First American Bank
description_short: Larry Minutillo is a mortgage loan officer at First American Bank in Chicago specializing in home purchase and refinance loans with personalized service through prequalification to closing.
description_long:
Larry Minutillo operates as a Mortgage Loan Originator (NMLS #503658) at First American Bank, a full-service financial institution. He is based in Chicago, Illinois at First American Bank's downtown office (33 W. Monroe St.) and serves clients seeking residential mortgage solutions. First American Bank is an established financial services provider offering comprehensive personal and business banking, wealth advisory, and lending services.

Minutillo's primary services include mortgage prequalification, pre-approval, and full mortgage origination for home purchases and refinances. He offers both fixed-rate and adjustable-rate mortgage (ARM) programs designed to meet individual borrower needs. His stated approach emphasizes personalized customer service, walking clients through each stage of the loan process from initial consultation through closing. He provides mortgage rate quotes and connects clients with educational resources including prequalification letters, buying power calculators, and first-time homebuyer guidance.

As a loan officer with First American Bank, Minutillo benefits from the institution's broader mortgage product suite, which includes construction loans, bridge loans, and foreign national lending programs. His role appears to be client-facing relationship management and loan origination, with access to the bank's underwriting and closing infrastructure. The bank's website emphasizes Lending University resources, mortgage calculators, and structured homebuying checklists to support borrowers.

While Minutillo is a legitimate, NMLS-registered loan officer with established contact information and a professional bank affiliation, prospective borrowers should note that individual loan terms, rates, and approval criteria depend on creditworthiness, income verification, and property appraisal. His services are most relevant to borrowers in or near the Chicago area seeking traditional bank-based mortgage origination with a dedicated loan officer relationship.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: NMLS-registered mortgage loan originator (#503658) with verifiable credentials and compliance standing
Offers both fixed-rate and adjustable-rate mortgage programs to match different borrower preferences
Provides pre-approval and prequalification services with personalized rate quotes
Supports first-time homebuyers with educational resources, checklists, and buying power calculators
Access to First American Bank's full mortgage product suite including construction and bridge loans
Local Chicago-based office with direct phone and email contact for personalized service
Connected to bank's broader financial services (savings, checking, investment advisory) for one-stop banking
cons: Geographic service limitation as a single loan officer in Chicago may limit availability for remote or out-of-state borrowers
Website content does not specify loan amounts, APR ranges, or specific lending criteria, requiring direct inquiry
No mention of specialized programs (FHA, VA, USDA) even though mortgage category includes these; limits clarity on full product range
Loan approval and terms depend entirely on credit qualification, income verification, and property appraisal—not guaranteed
Rates and terms not published online; borrowers must request quotes individually
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Chicago area seeking structured guidance and educational support through the mortgage process
Homeowners looking to refinance or purchase with a dedicated loan officer relationship at an established bank
Borrowers with stable income and good-to-excellent credit seeking traditional fixed or adjustable-rate mortgages
Individuals interested in bundling mortgage services with other banking products (checking, savings, investment advisory)
diagnosis: Larry Minutillo is best for Chicago-area borrowers seeking a traditional bank mortgage with personalized loan officer guidance and who have solid creditworthiness and income documentation. The main caveat is that he operates as a single loan officer in one location, so remote borrowers may face accessibility challenges, and all loan terms remain subject to individual credit and property qualification.
services: Loan process support from application through closing
Mortgage calculators and buying power assessment tools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
